visual_description: The first man with dark hair and a mustache, wearing a dark suit, exhales a cloud of smoke while a bright light creates a glare on his face. Then the scene shifts to a man wearing glasses and a suit, who looks down at a black briefcase before lifting the handle and leaning over it. Smoke drifts in the dim background as he manipulates the briefcase.
